data.name: 職場幻想
data.detailed_description:
歡迎加入官方聊天頻道

《職場幻想》給玩家呈現了一個自由度很高的小鎮，遊戲的覈心是和心動的女孩們互動、戀愛，同時包含動作、解謎、裝飾家園、角色陞級，挖礦、釣魚、趣味小遊戲等諸多內容，為您營造一個幻想中的小世界。

------------------------------------------------------------------

專屬內容：遊戲包含11位女孩的故事，46段CG動畫大圖，60段點數小人動畫，125張立繪。

主線故事：玩家會接觸5個性格不同的女孩，感受每個人獨特的故事，並且她們之間還有一些聯動。

特殊故事：遊戲中除了5個主角女孩外，還有6位性格各异的女孩，也許她們是更適合您的人。

家園系統：遊戲中可以買別墅，購買後能裝潢傢俱並邀請女孩們來自己的家裡作…… 客。

經濟系統：遊戲中通過撿破爛、挖礦、工作、釣魚、尋寶等管道賺錢，有錢當然就可以為所欲為。

攻略系統：每一位女孩的故事流程都擁有明確的任務攻略，按照任務呈現，一目了然，杜絕卡關。 “

------------------------------------------------------------------

data.short_description: 《職場幻想》講述了在一個虛構的海濱小鎮上，與溫柔姐姐、可愛妹妹、學姐、女同事、女首長、美女銷售、神秘天使… 女魅魔… 女幽靈… 發生奇妙姻緣的動作愛情故事。
data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 英文, 日文, 韓文, 法文, 俄文, 泰文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 印尼語, 波蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Series & AMD Zen R Series
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nivdia GTX/RTX Series & AMD RX Series (4G VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Recommended resolution: 1920 x 1080
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Series & AMD Zen R Series
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nivdia GTX/RTX Series & AMD RX Series (4G VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Recommended resolution: 1920 x 1080

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需使用 Apple 處理器
  • 處理器: Apple M series
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需使用 Apple 處理器
  • 處理器: Apple M series
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 10 MB 可用空間

data.name: Workplace Fantasy
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the official Group Chat or Discord

To better align with English language conventions, we have revised all English expressions.

Workplace Fantasy presents players with a high degree of freedom in a small town. The core of the game is to interact and fall in love with the girls who are in love. It also includes actions, puzzle solving, home decoration, character upgrades, mining, fishing, fun games, and many other contents, creating a small world in your imagination.

------------------------------------------------------------------

【1】Exclusive content: The game includes the story flow of 11 girls, 46 CG animated large images, 60 pixel character animations, and 125 stand up drawings.

【2】Main storyline: Players will encounter 5 girls with different personalities to experience each person's unique story, and there is also some linkage between them.

【3】Special Story: In addition to the 5 protagonist girls in the game, there are also 6 girls with different personalities, perhaps they are the more suitable people for you.

【4】Home system: In the game, you can buy a villa, decorate furniture, and invite girls to come to your home to work Guest.

【5】Economic system: In the game, players earn money by picking up scrap, mining, working, fishing, treasure hunting, and other means. With money, they can do whatever they want.

【6】Strategy system: Each girl's story process has a clear task strategy, presented according to the task, clear at a glance, and eliminates obstacles. “

------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to the official Group Chat or Discord

To better align with English language conventions, we have revised all English expressions.

Workplace Fantasy presents players with a high degree of freedom in a small town. The core of the game is to interact and fall in love with the girls who are in love. It also includes actions, puzzle solving, home decoration, character upgrades, mining, fishing, fun games, and many other contents, creating a small world in your imagination.

【1】Exclusive content: The game includes the story flow of 11 girls, 46 CG animated large images, 60 pixel character animations, and 125 stand up drawings.

【2】Main storyline: Players will encounter 5 girls with different personalities to experience each person's unique story, and there is also some linkage between them.

------------------------------------------------------------------
data.short_description: "Workplace Fantasy" is an action-adventure love story about a man's enchanting encounters with a gentle older sister, an adorable younger sister, an older university female, female colleagues, female supervisors, beautiful saleswomen, mysterious angels, and even a female succubus and a female ghost.
data.supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, French, Russian, Thai, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish, Portuguese - Brazil, Indonesian, Polish
